Quarter: The specific quarter and year when the measurement was made.
Vehicle Model: The specific model of Elexion electric vehicle which the battery assembly time measurement applies to.
Battery Assembly Time Change (%): The percentage change in battery assembly time for the specified vehicle model compared to the previous quarter. A negative value indicates an improvement (reduction in time).
Data Source: The source of the data, such as 'Internal Manufacturing Dashboard', where the battery assembly time measurement was recorded.
